properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I come to the garden alone While the dew is still on the roses And the voice I hear falling on my ear The Son of God discloses.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: And He walks with me, And He talks with me, And He tells me I am His own; And the joy we share as we tarry there, None other has ever known.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: He speaks, and the sound of His voice, Is so sweet the birds hush their singing, And the melody that He gave to me Within my heart is ringing.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I'd stay in the garden with Him Though the night around me be falling, But He bids me go, through the voice of woe His voice to me is calling.
